title: Hana's Pride Blahaj [Cobblemon]
description: Cobblemon add-on that adds pride Blåhaj fakemon!
body:
### A data pack & resource pack that adds many Pride Blåhaj to Cobblemon!
- requires the following add-on by [Avayren - Blahaj (Cobblemon)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blahaj-cobblemon)

Since I've also made some changes to the Blåhaj's stats they'll be listed here. Making it lean towards special bulk and physical atk. The move pool changes are too numerious to list here.

**ABILITIES**:
```
Water Absorb
+ Strong Jaw
```

**STATS**:
```
hp unchanged (100)
atk 70 -> 95
def 72 -> 90
sp.atk 53 -> 45
sp.def 62 -> 90
spd 100 -> 90

bst: 510
```

**FULL GUIDE**:
```
- prismatic (pride) - red dye
- tangy (lesbian) - orange dye
- ringed (intersex) - yellow dye
- pelopon (aromantic) - lime dye
- null (agender) - green dye
- toned (pansexual) - cyan dye
- minty (gay) - light blue dye
- whorl (genderfluid) - blue dye
- monarch (non-binary) - purple dye
- ultraviolet (bisexual) - magenta dye
- embroidered (transgender) - pink dye
- lace (demigirl) - white dye
- kaleidoscope (polygender) - light gray dye
- aroace (aroace) - gray dye
- twilight (ace) - black dye
- heather (demiboy) - brown dye
- soft-twilight(demi-sexual) - ink sac
- soft-pelopon(demi-romantic) - kelp
```
🏳️‍🌈 Happy pride 🏳️‍🌈

Installation:
Download the attached file and it's dependant add-on, place them in both your world's datapacks folder and your resourcepacks folder. Make sure the resource packs are enabled & Cobblemon is downloaded before you report any bugs.
